task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map to the relevant islands (Pitcairn or Mangareva/Totegegie).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the map centered on Pitcairn Island or the Gambier Islands (Mangareva), or search terms for these locations in the search bar.

task_completion.description: Agent activates the Ruler tool or the 'Add Path' tool to perform the measurement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Ruler' dialog box or 'New Path' properties window is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: The measurement line originates at Pitcairn Island.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A yellow (or colored) line is visible on the map, with one endpoint clearly located on Pitcairn Island.

task_completion.description: The measurement line terminates at Totegegie Airport.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The other endpoint of the line is located on the airstrip on the reef islet (Totegegie) near Mangareva.

task_completion.description: The measured distance is displayed and is approximately correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ruler or Path dialog shows a distance/length value close to 555 km (approx 345 miles or 300 nautical miles).

task_completion.description: Agent enters the specific name for the saved path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Pitcairn to Totegegie Airfield' is visible in the Name field of the save dialog or properties window.

task_completion.description: The path is successfully saved to 'My Places'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' or 'My Places' sidebar is visible and lists an item named 'Pitcairn to Totegegie Airfield'.

integrity.description: Agent uses the application GUI to measure and save, not a script or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard application windows (Google Earth or similar GIS), mouse cursors, and dialog boxes, rather than code execution or terminal output.

integrity.description: The distance is derived from a visual line on the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: A line connecting the two geographic points is visible on the map canvas during the process.

integrity.description: Agent performs the measurement within the tool rather than searching the answer online and creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser is not used to search 'distance from Pitcairn to Totegegie' on Google/Wikipedia; the data comes from the map tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pitcairn Island is located at -25.067, -130.100. Totegegie Airport is located at -23.080, -134.890. The distance between them is approximately 555 km (345 miles). The required path name is 'Pitcairn to Totegegie Airfield'.
